---
title: "analyze_workflow.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\expansion_test_new\.agents\skills\workflow-analyst\analyze_workflow.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.13
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.61
---

## Intent
The `analyze_workflow.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on WorkflowAnalyst, __init__, analyze, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via WorkflowAnalyst, __init__, analyze, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [collections](file://collections)

### Exports
- `WorkflowAnalyst`
- `__init__`
- `analyze`
- `main`
